gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 5, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado5 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 6, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado6 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
IF nEstado3=0 AND nEstado4=0 AND nEstado5=0 AND nEstado6=0 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 7, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 8, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 9, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 10, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 11, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
ELSE IF nEstado3=1 AND nEstado4=1 AND nEstado5=1 AND nEstado6=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 7, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 8, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 9, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 10, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 11, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
END
ELSE IF nEstado3=1 OR nEstado4=1 OR nEstado5=1 OR nEstado6=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 7, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 8, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 9, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 10, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 11, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
END
END
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 2, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nEstado3=1 AND nEstado4=1 AND nEstado5=1 AND nEstado6=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE IF nEstado3=0 AND nEstado4=0 AND nEstado5=0 AND nEstado6=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
ELSE IF nEstado3=1 OR nEstado4=1 OR nEstado5=1 OR nEstado6=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
END
